basic_details.job_title: ESIC Bikaner Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Specialist, Senior Resident, Junior Resident Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees State Insurance Corporation Bikaner (ESIC Bikaner)
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation Bikaner (ESIC Bikaner) has published the Specialist, Senior Resident, and Junior Resident Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 15 posts across various medical specialties. Candidates within the age range of Senior Resident: up to 45 years; Specialists: up to 67 years (relaxation as per category rules) and holding a PG/DNB/Diploma in the concerned specialty or MBBS with experience are eligible to attend the walk-in interview at the hospital. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 26 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notificatio

age_limit.age_details: Senior Resident: Max 45 years. Specialists: Max 67 years.
age_limit.details: Senior Resident: Maximum 45 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS as per rules. Specialists: Maximum 67 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree or diploma / DNB in concerned specialty, PG Degree or equivalent with Post PG experience, or MBBS with experience.
qualification.details: Senior Resident: PG Degree or diploma / DNB in concerned specialty from recognized university. Valid registration from MCI / State Medical Council. Specialists: PG Degree or equivalent. Valid registration from MCI / State Medical Council. 03-year Post PG experience or PG Diploma with 05-year post PG experience in respective specialty from recognized university. Senior/Junior Resident (44 days): PG Degree or diploma / DNB will be preferred. MBBS with experience in any discipline will be considered if PG candidates are not available. Preference will be given to candidates who have worked in ESIC & are well verse with online Dhanwantri module.

salary_details.pay_scale: Specialists: Rs 121408/- per month Consolidated remuneration. Senior/Junior Resident (44 days): Consolidated remuneration of 1,21,048/- for one month and for the remaining period on pro-rata basis.
salary_details.senior/junior resident (44 days): Consolidated remuneration of 1,21,048/- for one month and for the remaining period on pro-rata basis.

selection_process: Walk-in interview Document verification Medical fitness test

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Bikaner?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Bikaner is scheduled for 26 May 2026. Candidates are advised to report for document submission between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the same day.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Specialist, Senior Resident, and Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies available for the Specialist, Senior Resident, and Junior Resident posts at ESIC Bikaner. The distribution across various specialities is detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post. Generally, a PG Degree or diploma/DNB in the concerned specialty is required. For some posts, MBBS with experience may also be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Senior Resident and Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Senior Residents is 45 years, and for Specialists, it is 67 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/EWS categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies. Specialists can expect Rs 121408/- per month. Senior Residents will be paid as per 7th CPC level 11. Junior Residents (44 days) will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs 1,21,048/- for one month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ESIC Bikaner recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for ESIC Bikaner recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to appear for the interview with all required documents at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for ESIC Bikaner going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ESIC Bikaner office. The exact address and venue details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a walk-in interview, followed by document verification and a medical fitness test for the shortlisted candidates.
